provenance.note: SELF-GENERATED regression fixture (NOT an external oracle): produced by hartree itself (round 10) to pin the PBEh-3c composite against drift. Geometries from tests/ref/geometries.json (bohr).

engines.scf: hartree RKS hyb_gga_xc_pbeh_3c (xcx private id 100005: PBE-x kappa=1.0245 mu=10/81 + PBE-c beta=0.03, 42% exact exchange), def2-mSVP, grid 3
engines.d3: hartree D3(BJ)-ATM, pbeh-3c parameters (s6=1, s8=0.0, a1=0.4860, a2=4.5000, s9=1; ATM zero damping, simple-dftd3 convention)
engines.gcp: hartree gCP, PBEh-3c parameter set (sigma=1, eta=1.32492, alpha=0.27649, beta=1.95600, damped k_s=4 k_e=6, mSVP emiss/nbas tables; mctc-gcp case('pbeh3c') convention)

provenance.method: PBEh-3c: modified-PBE 42% EXX hybrid/def2-mSVP + D3(BJ)-ATM + damped gCP; Grimme, Brandenburg, Bannwarth, Hansen, J. Chem. Phys. 143, 054107 (2015)

bare_functional.note: plain hyb_gga_xc_pbeh_3c/def2-mSVP grid-3 SCF, no corrections (functional-wiring sanity pin; exx_fraction 0.42 exercises the hybrid EXX path)
